steps.title: Match both parts of the claim
steps.content: The student's claim has two parts: smaller areas were less congested than a very large city, and congestion in those smaller areas still worsened over time. The data description must show both.

steps.title: Reject incomplete data claims
steps.content: Choice A gives a low-delay point but not worsening over time. Choice C contradicts the claim by making Albuquerque greater than New York City. Choice D gives one New York City value only. The answer is B.
